name: Bavarian Spice Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: Package Pillsbury Plus Devil's Food Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 12-cup fluted tube pan.
In a large bowl, combine cake mix, cinnamon, nutmeg, mashed potatoes, butter, water, and eggs until just moistened. Beat with highest speed for 2 minutes. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until golden brown and toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Cool in pan upright for 25 minutes; then turn out onto serving plate and cool completely.
In a small saucepan, melt chocolate chips over low heat with butter and milk, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in powdered sugar until smooth. If needed, add more milk to desired consistency. Pour glaze over cooled cake, allowing some to drip down sides. Garnish as desired. Makes 16 servings.
